```{r Sepsis table}
sepsis_table <- tibble(
NoOfInfections = total_sepses |> unlist() |> format(),
PooledMean = total_sepsis_rates |> select(ends_with("_D")) |> unlist(),
Q1 := sepsis_rate_quartiles |> select(ends_with("_D")) |> slice(1) |> unlist(),
Median := sepsis_rate_quartiles |> select(ends_with("_D")) |> slice(2) |> unlist(),
Q3 := sepsis_rate_quartiles |> select(ends_with("_D")) |> slice(3) |> unlist()) |>
  as.data.frame()

colnames(sepsis_table) <-c(trnsl$sepsisTable$NoOfInfections, trnsl$sepsisTable$PooledMean, trnsl$sepsisTable$Q1, trnsl$sepsisTable$Median, trnsl$sepsisTable$Q3)
rownames(sepsis_table) <- c(trnsl$sepsisTable$Total, trnsl$sepsisTable$Pathogens, trnsl$sepsisTable$Commensals, trnsl$sepsisTable$Clinical, trnsl$sepsisTable$CvcAssociated, trnsl$sepsisTable$PvcAssociated, trnsl$sepsisTable$CsfPositive)

sepsis_table |>
  kbl(
    digits = c(0,1,1,1,1),
    align = "rrrrr",
    format.args = list(nsmall = 1)) |>
  kable_styling() |>
#  add_header_above(data.frame(c(" ", trnsl$sepsisTable$IncidenceRate), c(2, 4)))|>
  add_indent(2:7)


# %>%
  # footnote(
    # number = "$\\text{Inzidenz} = \\frac{\\text{Anzahl der Infektionen}}{\\text{Anzahl der Patienten}} \\times 100$",
    # threeparttable = TRUE,
    # escape = FALSE)
```
